findings.message: The `Impact` confidence rationale is still using the old scope estimate. It says the blast radius is
but the same brief now correctly identifies 9 source files and 7 affected test files. That stale scope statement weakens the confidence section.
The risk mitigation text is also stale. It says the plan includes updates for
but the current dependency/test sections enumerate 7 concrete test files that need updates.
which conflicts with the corrected `7 test files updated` inventory and the evidence-gap review below. This is an internal consistency issue rather than a planning blocker.

The `Live.tsx` risk is now stale as written. The brief has already resolved and verified that `Live.tsx` does not use the cash-form booleans, so this should no longer be framed as a medium-likelihood open risk.
